name: Paw Performance Polo-XXL Women Blue
shortDescription: Wrap yourself in comfort and express your love for pets with this women’s XXL-fit polo in a cool, calming blue. Designed with a soft cotton-poly blend and a flattering relaxed silhouette, it features a charming embroidered paw print that blends cat and dog paws — a simple yet meaningful touch for every pet-loving woman.
description: Wrap yourself in comfort and express your love for pets with this women’s XXL-fit polo in a cool, calming blue. Designed with a soft cotton-poly blend and a flattering relaxed silhouette, it features a charming embroidered paw print that blends cat and dog paws — a simple yet meaningful touch for every pet-loving woman. Size: XXL (Women’s Fit) Color: Blue Material: Soft and breathable cotton-poly blend Design: Embroidered paw print combining both cat and dog motifs Fit: Relaxed and flattering XXL women’s cut with shaped seams and capped sleeves Care: Machine washable for easy maintenance and long-lasting wear Whether you’re walking your pup, cuddling your cat, or just out and about, this polo keeps you stylish, comfy, and close to what matters most.
